title: More Weapons!
body:
**Are you bored with swords and axes? This mod adds more weapons types into Minecraft!**


**Daggers:**
- Wooden Dagger

- Gold Dagger

- Stone Dagger

- Iron Dagger

- Diamond Dagger

- Netherite Dagger

**Daggers are fast attacking weapons with medium damage.**

**Hammers:**

- Wooden Hammer

- Gold Hammer

- Stone Hammer

- Iron Hammer

- Diamond Hammer

- Netherite Hammer

**Hammers are slow weapons, but with a lot of damage.**

**Battleaxes:**
- Diamond Battleaxe
**Battleaxes deal more damage than axes but require more resources to craft.**


**I created Daggers especially for people who don't like the 1.9+ PvP system. Me? I like both systems. This just allows those people to use Daggers (which have no attack cooldown) and still use the new features of new updates.**
